overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a vehicle driving through a futuristic elevated highway interchange at twilight. The scene features massive concrete overpass structures with glowing holographic advertisements, neon-lit skyscrapers, and a dystopian cyberpunk atmosphere with atmospheric haze and mixed natural-artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cyberpunk highway beneath holographic advertisement displays

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the elevated highway beneath massive overpass structures with glowing holographic advertisements overhead

notable_agents.action: futuristic dark sedan overtaking in the left lane

entered.detail: massive curved concrete overpass structure with holographic displays on the underside
glowing cyan and orange advertisement screens mounted on the underside of the overpass
dark silhouetted mountains visible through the haze in the distance
thick cylindrical pillar supporting the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels straight along a multi-lane elevated highway beneath a massive curved overpass system. Holographic advertisements glow cyan and orange on the underside of the structure above, while mountains are visible through the haze to the right. Another vehicle overtakes on the left as the camera maintains a steady forward trajectory.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway ramp overlooking valley and lower roadways

events.description: vehicle follows the rightward curve of the highway, opening up the view to the valley and lower roadways below
vehicle begins turning left, transitioning the view from the landscape back toward the urban center

agents.ego_description: navigating the rightward curve with the landscape visible to the right, then beginning the leftward turn toward the city

entered.detail: parallel highway visible below and to the right with vehicle lights traveling along it
distant futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows becoming visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The highway curves right, revealing an expansive view of the valley below with lower roadways and distant city lights. The vehicle continues through the curve, transitioning from the open landscape view back toward the urban core as the massive overpass structure shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange with towering futuristic skyscrapers on the left

events.description: futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows become prominent on the left as the vehicle rounds the curve
vehicle continues the leftward curve through the multi-level interchange

agents.ego_description: executing a sustained leftward turn through the highway interchange, with the illuminated city skyline dominating the left side of the frame

notable_agents.action: vehicle visible on the lower roadway to the right traveling in the opposite direction

entered.detail: concrete traffic barrier with orange and white striped pattern separating the lanes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues turning left through the complex interchange, bringing towering cyberpunk skyscrapers into prominent view on the left. The highway passes beneath multiple levels of overpasses while the mountain range disappears behind the infrastructure. Concrete barriers line the left side of the road as the curve continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with dense urban architecture

events.description: bright yellow sports car overtakes on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing through the interchange with towering cyberpunk buildings on the left and complex overpass structures overhead

notable_agents.action: bright yellow sports car overtaking quickly in the left lane

entered.detail: tall street lamp with bright white light illuminating the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle proceeds through the final section of the interchange with the city skyline now close on the left. A bright yellow sports car overtakes quickly in the left lane. The highway continues beneath the curved overpass system with holographic advertisements glowing overhead, while streetlights illuminate the road ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward journey along an elevated highway that transitions from a hazy mountain vista into the dense, neon-lit heart of a cyberpunk metropolis. It begins with the vehicle traveling beneath a massive curved overpass adorned with cyan and orange holographic advertisements, while distant mountains remain visible through the atmospheric haze. As the highway curves right, the view opens up to reveal an expansive valley and lower roadways before the trajectory shifts back toward the urban core. The scene then tightens as the vehicle turns left through a complex interchange, causing the mountains to disappear behind towering skyscrapers and multi-layered concrete infrastructure. Finally, the camera proceeds deep into the city skyline, passing beneath glowing overhead displays as a bright yellow sports car streaks past toward the illuminated road ahead.
